summary: W1495 refines the W1494 W987 construction surface by reassembling the source pretriangulated, source triangulated, and source triangle-completion fields into the W722 source-triangulation provider used by earlier routes. It proves that both the constructed W722 provider and the W1477 input produced through W1494 project back to the same three source-triangulation fields, while preserving the W1494 74-input ledger, fixed-target uniqueness split, endpoint open-map split, unit mapping-cone open-map split, endpoint and unit mapping-cone kernel/cokernel/closed-embedding splits, selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 splits, mapped-cokernel split, target-surjectivity split, target-compactness split, normalized lift object-image split, and localized right-adjoint functor split. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

W1495 only packages existing source-triangulation fields into the W722 provider and verifies their projections through W1494 and W1477; it does not prove sourcePretriangulated, sourceTriangulated, triangleCompletion, or any of the other remaining 74 constructor inputs from mathematical data.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; the current route still relies on assumed boundary, relation, target-surjectivity, target-compactness, mapped-cokernel, selected-difference, normalized-lift, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation, endpoint, localized-unit, and unit mapping-cone fields rather than a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1495 source-pretriangulated, source-triangulated, and triangle-completion fields together with the remaining W1494 constructor inputs, or replace the field-ledger route with an explicit positive witness satisfying the positive-witness supplement.
Before any product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
